anchanto.title: Junior Deployment Consultant
anchanto.description: Contributed to the deployment and ongoing support of SaaS solutions for e-commerce, logistics and supply chain operations. Worked with OMS, WMS and OXM platforms while collaborating with French clients and international technical and functional teams.

missions.support: Analyzed and monitored customer incidents using Zendesk and Jira.
missions.product: Formalized product improvement requests using Aha!.
missions.localization: Adapted product interfaces for the French market using Crowdin and JSON files.
missions.accountManagement: Monitored existing accounts, prioritized incidents and coordinated internal actions.

About.title: A technical profile with a strong understanding of business needs.

paragraphs.first: After studying computer science, I continued my education at Epitech with a specialization in Data and Artificial Intelligence.
paragraphs.second: During a two-year apprenticeship at Anchanto, I worked in an international SaaS environment focused on e-commerce, logistics and supply chain operations.
paragraphs.third: This experience allowed me to work on OMS, WMS and OXM deployments, functional testing, customer support, incident resolution and continuous product improvement.
paragraphs.fourth: I now want to apply this combination of technical and functional skills to Data projects that turn information into useful decision-making tools.

profile.label: Professional profile
profile.title: Data Analyst / Data Engineer
profile.description: I am interested in projects covering the entire data lifecycle: collection, transformation, storage, analysis, visualization and delivery.
profile.focusValue: Data Analytics, BI, Data Engineering and AI
profile.goalValue: Join a company in a full-time Data role
